'''zhabumu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:scalder|scalder]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-b-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:scalder|scalder]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| zhabumu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhæbimith|zhæbimith]] || [[word:zhæbimij|zhæbimij]] || [[word:zhæbimish|zhæbimish]] || [[word:zhæbimi|zhæbimi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhabubumuth|zhabubumuth]] || [[word:zhabubumuj|zhabubumuj]] || [[word:zhabubumush|zhabubumush]] || [[word:zhabubumu|zhabubumu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhabumuth|zhabumuth]] || [[word:zhabumuj|zhabumuj]] || [[word:zhabumush|zhabumush]] || [[word:zhabumu|zhabumu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhabufmuth|zhabufmuth]] || [[word:zhabufmuj|zhabufmuj]] || [[word:zhabufmush|zhabufmush]] || [[word:zhabufmuf|zhabufmuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zhabumuthu|zhabumuthu]] || [[word:zhabumuju|zhabumuju]] || [[word:zhabumushu|zhabumushu]] || [[word:zhabumuku|zhabumuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zhabumuth|zhabumuth]] || [[word:zhabumuj|zhabumuj]] || [[word:zhabumush|zhabumush]] || [[word:zhabumu|zhabumu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zhabumuthul|zhabumuthul]] || [[word:zhabumujul|zhabumujul]] || [[word:zhabumushul|zhabumushul]] || [[word:zhabumukul|zhabumukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zhabumuthuthu|zhabumuthuthu]] || [[word:zhabumujuju|zhabumujuju]] || [[word:zhabumushushu|zhabumushushu]] || [[word:zhabumuku|zhabumuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zhabumuthun|zhabumuthun]] || [[word:zhabumujun|zhabumujun]] || [[word:zhabumushun|zhabumushun]] || [[word:zhabumukun|zhabumukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zhabumuthuoro|zhabumuthuoro]] || [[word:zhabumujuoro|zhabumujuoro]] || [[word:zhabumushuoro|zhabumushuoro]] || [[word:zhabumukuoro|zhabumukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|3a936e1}}
